name: @act-spec/example-astro-docs
description: Minimal Astro + markdown documentation site demonstrating zero-friction ACT generation via the @act-spec/plugin-astro integration.

scripts.conformance: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-astro-docs: example exercises end-to-end via conformance')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-astro-docs: lint covered by Astro at build time')"
